description_long: This is a modern rectangular wooden desk with a minimalist design, featuring a light natural wood finish. The table has a solid left panel leg and a right-side support structure that incorporates two integrated drawers with subtle horizontal handles. The tabletop is broad and flat, providing ample workspace, while the right side drawers offer practical storage for office supplies or personal items. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the table a clean and contemporary appearance suitable for professional or home office settings. The construction appears sturdy, with the left panel and right drawer unit providing balanced support. There are no visible decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern, light wood rectangular desk with a solid left panel and two right-side drawers, featuring a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad tabletop, left panel leg, and two right-side drawers with visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the tabletop and the plain, uninterrupted wood grain on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid left panel and the back of the right-side support, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the tabletop and the plain left panel, with no drawers visible.
attribute_number_of_legs: Left solid panel and right drawer block as supports
